name: Pineapple Chiffon Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 and 1/4 cups crushed pineapple with syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together in the top of a double boiler gelatin, sugar, and salt.
2. Beat egg yolks slightly, stir in pineapple and syrup.
3. Add to gelatin mixture.
4. Cook over boiling water, stirring constantly until gelatin is dissolved (about 8 minutes).
5. Remove from heat and stir in lemon juice.
6. Chill until the eggs reach a consistency that will stiffen when beaten.
7. Beat ice water and powdered milk together until stiff and forms peaks when beaten by hand (approximately 10 minutes).
8. Fold into gelatin mixture.
9. Spoon 1/4 of the mixture into a 9 by 5 inch loaf pan, top with 2 or 3 cookies; repeat twice and finish with a layer of the chiffon mixture.
10. Chill until firm.
Approximately 114 calories per serving.
